title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Salarpuria Sattva

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Salarpuria Sattva
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
